title: Korak 26

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
import secrets
import string


def generate_password(length, nums, special_chars, uppercase, lowercase):
    # Define the possible characters for the password
    letters = string.ascii_letters
    digits = string.digits
    symbols = string.punctuation

    # Combine all characters
    all_characters = letters + digits + symbols

    while True:
        password = ''
        # Generate password
        for _ in range(length):
            password += secrets.choice(all_characters)
        constraints = []
        
    return password

# new_password = generate_password(8)
# print(new_password)

import secrets
import string


def generate_password(length, nums, special_chars, uppercase, lowercase):
    # Define the possible characters for the password
    letters = string.ascii_letters
    digits = string.digits
    symbols = string.punctuation

    # Combine all characters
    all_characters = letters + digits + symbols

    while True:
        password = ''
        # Generate password
        for _ in range(length):
            password += secrets.choice(all_characters)
        constraints = []
        
    return password

tests.text: Trebalo bi da dodaš tupel u listu constraints.

description:
Tuple je druga struktura podataka ugrađena u Python. Tuple je veoma sličan listi, ali se kreira korišćenjem običnih zagrada (), umesto uglastih zagrada. Takođe, tuple je nepromenljiv (immutable), za razliku od liste.

my_tuple = ('larch', 1, True)

Vaš spisak constraints će skladištiti tupel. Prvi element svakog tupa biće parametar ograničenja.

Promeni listu raspoloživosti constraints dodajući tuple u vaš list. Koristi nums kao prvi element i niz praznih karaktera kao drugi element.
